summary.concern: Katie Holmes & Sean Springs — 20 overdue tasks

paragraphs: Overdue climbed to 86 — we need to reverse this today. This is above the 7-day average of 75 — the trend is heading the wrong direction. 21 tasks are actively in progress — that's solid execution across the board. 4 tasks should be active but are stuck waiting on blockers — these need immediate attention. Credit to CANDACE - JUSTIN P REFERRAL (CNG2025-522) — cleared all overdue.

**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** The oldest overdue task is 14 days past due with 20 total — this schedule needs a reset. 188 tasks starting in the next 7 days. **75 of those have nobody assigned** — these need a name on them before they're due or they'll become overdue with no accountability. 36 overdue payments are holding up the pipeline — every day these sit, the schedule slips further. **$75,066 in payments going out this week** across 41 tasks — make sure funds are available. $46,938 expected in from 6 client payments. Heavy week ahead for Clifford Clack — Gym Addition and Katie Holmes & Sean Springs — make sure resources are lined up.
